title: TeachableEnrollment
description: A student enrollment in a Teachable course.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the enrolled user.

enrolled_at.description: Datetime when the user enrolled in the course.

expires_at.description: Datetime when the enrollment expires, or null if it does not expire.

completed_at.description: Datetime when the user completed the course, or null if not completed.

percent_complete.description: Percentage of the course the user has completed.
